description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine set_genang_2, and is implemented by a call to set_genang_2. Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for generators for which the angle differs from the angular average by more than a specified threshold. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_genang(status, angle) ierr, status,angle = set_genang()
python_syntax: ierr = set_genang(status, angle) ierr, status,angle = set_genang()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Deviation threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

status.description: enable scanning for generators exceeding angle threshold.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
